en: First aider training of at least 16 hours or equivalent must be completed. The locations of first aid facilities must be communicated to employees.\nEmployee Protection Act, Section 26(3)\nConstruction Workers Protection Ordinance, Section 31(3), 31(6)

First aid supplies appropriate to workforce size and injury risks must be provided. First aid storage must be easily accessible and clearly marked.\nEmployee Protection Act, Section 26(1-2)\nConstruction Workers Protection Ordinance, Section 31(2)
A minimum number of trained first aiders, based on workforce size and risk, must be ensured.\nWorkplace Ordinance, Section 40(1,4)
